//: Persistent Mode - Hybrid stable MCP setup.

args: if command -v npx-nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx-nvm -v >/dev/null 2>&1; then NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx-nvm); else NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx); fi; exec "$NPX_BIN" -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory "$HOME/.brain/memory"

if command -v npx-nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx-nvm -v >/dev/null 2>&1; then NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx-nvm); else NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx); fi; exec "$NPX_BIN" -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem "$HOME"
if command -v npx-nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx-nvm -v >/dev/null 2>&1; then NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx-nvm); else NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx); fi; exec "$NPX_BIN" -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github

if command -v npx-nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx-nvm -v >/dev/null 2>&1; then NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx-nvm); else NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx); fi; exec "$NPX_BIN" -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking
if command -v npx-nvm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx-nvm -v >/dev/null 2>&1; then NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx-nvm); else NPX_BIN=$(command -v npx); fi; exec "$NPX_BIN" -y @upstash/context7-mcp@latest
